@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# turtle_nest_devel
+
+
+´export ROS2_WS=<workspace_path>´
+For example 
+´export ROS2_WS="/home/user/ros2_ws/src"´
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+ARG BASE_IMAGE=ros:humble
+FROM $BASE_IMAGE
+
+# Setup a user
+ARG UNAME=user
+ARG UID=1000
+ARG GID=1000
+RUN groupadd -g ${GID} -o ${UNAME}
+RUN useradd -m -u ${UID} -g ${GID} -o -s /bin/bash ${UNAME}
+RUN usermod -aG sudo ${UNAME}
+RUN echo '%sudo ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL' >> /etc/sudoers
+USER ${UNAME}
+WORKDIR /home/user
+
+# Create a custom workspace
+ENV ROS2_WS=/home/user/ros2_ws
+RUN mkdir -p ${ROS2_WS}/src
+
+# Disable terminal interaction for apt
+ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
+
+# Make default shell in Dockerfile bash instead of sh
+SHELL ["/bin/bash", "-c"]
+
+# Setup cyclone DDS
+ENV RMW_IMPLEMENTATION=rmw_cyclonedds_cpp
+
+# Install dependencies
+# ROS already comes with gtest, but not with libgmock. Install it
+RUN sudo apt-get update && \
+    sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
+    libgmock-dev \
+    ros-${ROS_DISTRO}-rmw-cyclonedds-cpp \
+    && sudo apt-get clean && \
+    sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+# Copy the Turtle Nest ROS package and build our custom workspace
+COPY turtle_nest/ ${ROS2_WS}/src/turtle_nest
+RUN cd ${ROS2_WS} && \
+    sudo apt-get update && \
+    . /opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && \
+    rosdep update && rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src -r -y --rosdistro ${ROS_DISTRO} && \
+    colcon build --symlink-install && \
+    sudo apt-get clean && \
+    sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+# Add the tests
+COPY turtle_nest_tests ${ROS2_WS}/src/turtle_nest_tests
+RUN sudo chown -R user:user ${ROS2_WS}/src && \
+    cd ${ROS2_WS}/src/turtle_nest_tests && \
+    mkdir build && cd build && \
+    qmake .. && \
+    make
+
+# Create a folder for app configs
+RUN mkdir -p /home/user/.config/TurtleNest/
+
+# Source ROS workspace automatically when new terminal is opened
+RUN sudo echo ". /opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash" >> ~/.bashrc && \
+    sudo echo ". ${ROS2_WS}/install/setup.bash" >> ~/.bashrc
+
+# Source ROS in the main terminal
+COPY docker/ros_entrypoint.sh /ros_entrypoint.sh
+ENTRYPOINT ["/ros_entrypoint.sh"]
+
+CMD ["bash"]

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+services:
+  turtle_nest:
+    image: turtle_nest
+    build:
+      context: ../
+      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile
+    container_name: turtle_nest
+    stop_signal: SIGINT
+    network_mode: host
+    privileged: true
+    stdin_open: true
+    tty: true
+    user: user
+    volumes:
+      - /tmp/.X11-unix:/tmp/.X11-unix
+      - ${ROS2_WS}:/home/user/ros2_ws/src
+      - ../turtle_nest:/home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest
+      - /home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest/build/ # Exclude build from being mounted
+      - ../turtle_nest_tests:/home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest_tests
+      - /home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest_tests/build/  # Exclude build from being mounted
+      - ${HOME}/.config/TurtleNest:/home/user/.config/TurtleNest
+    environment:
+      - DISPLAY
+      - QT_X11_NO_MITSHM=1
+      - ROS_DOMAIN_ID=42
+    command: bash
+
+  test:
+    image: turtle_nest
+    container_name: turtle_nest_tests
+    profiles: ["test"]
+    volumes:
+      - ../turtle_nest:/home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest
+      - /home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest/build/ # Exclude build from being mounted
+      - ../turtle_nest_tests:/home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest_tests
+      - /home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest_tests/build/  # Exclude build from being mounted
+
+    command: bash -c "cd /home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest_tests/build/ && make && ./turtle_nest_tests"
+
+  test-jazzy:
+    image: turtle_nest_jazzy
+    build:
+      context: ../
+      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile
+      args:
+          BASE_IMAGE: ros:jazzy
+    container_name: turtle_nest_test_jazzy
+    profiles: ["test-distros"]
+    stdin_open: true
+    tty: true
+    command: /home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest_tests/build/turtle_nest_tests
+
+  test-iron:
+    image: turtle_nest_iron
+    build:
+      context: ../
+      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile
+      args:
+          BASE_IMAGE: ros:iron
+    container_name: turtle_nest_test_iron
+    profiles: ["test-iron"]
+    stdin_open: true
+    tty: true
+    command: /home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest_tests/build/turtle_nest_tests
+
+  test-rolling:
+    image: turtle_nest_rolling
+    build:
+      context: ../
+      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile
+      args:
+          BASE_IMAGE: ros:rolling
+    container_name: turtle_nest_test_rolling
+    profiles: ["test-rolling"]
+    stdin_open: true
+    tty: true
+    command: /home/user/ros2_ws/src/turtle_nest_tests/build/turtle_nest_tests
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -e
+
+# If the config doesn't exist on the first startup, it will be created with
+# root permissions. Need to change the ownership to user for settings to work correctly.
+sudo chown -R user:user /home/user/.config/TurtleNest
+
+. "/opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash"
+. "${ROS2_WS}/install/setup.bash"
+
+exec "$@"
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,101 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
+project(turtle_nest)
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+# find dependencies
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+find_package(Qt5 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Core Gui Widgets)
+
+
+# Set sources
+set(SOURCES
+  src/main.cpp
+  src/mainwindow.cpp
+  src/file_utils.cpp
+  src/generate_launch.cpp
+  src/generate_node.cpp
+  src/rospkgcreator.cpp
+  src/string_tools.cpp
+)
+
+# Set UI files
+set(UI_FILES
+  src/mainwindow.ui
+)
+
+# Use Qt5's tools to process the .ui file
+qt5_wrap_ui(UI_HEADERS ${UI_FILES})
+
+# Add MOC processing for header files
+set(MOC_HEADERS
+  include/turtle_nest/mainwindow.h
+)
+
+qt5_wrap_cpp(MOC_SOURCES ${MOC_HEADERS})
+
+# Set resource files
+set(RESOURCE_FILES
+    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/resources.qrc
+)
+
+# Compile resource files into object files
+qt5_add_resources(QRC_SOURCES ${RESOURCE_FILES})
+
+
+# Add the executable
+add_executable(turtle_nest ${SOURCES} ${UI_HEADERS} ${MOC_SOURCES} ${QRC_SOURCES})
+
+target_include_directories(turtle_nest PUBLIC
+  $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
+  $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}>  # Include directory for generated ui_mainwindow.h
+  $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)
+
+# List of distribution files
+set(DISTFILES
+    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/custom_theme.qss
+)
+
+# Add a custom command to copy distribution files to the build directory
+foreach(file ${DISTFILES})
+    add_custom_command(TARGET turtle_nest
+        POST_BUILD
+        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different ${file} $<TARGET_FILE_DIR:turtle_nest>
+    )
+endforeach()
+
+
+target_compile_features(turtle_nest PUBLIC c_std_99 cxx_std_17)  # Require C99 and C++17
+ament_target_dependencies(
+  turtle_nest
+)
+
+install(TARGETS turtle_nest
+  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})
+
+# Install globally visible executable
+install(PROGRAMS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/turtle_nest
+  DESTINATION bin
+  RENAME turtle-nest)
+
+target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME}
+  Qt5::Widgets
+  Qt5::Core
+  Qt5::Gui
+)
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  # the following line skips the linter which checks for copyrights
+  # comment the line when a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_copyright_FOUND TRUE)
+  # the following line skips cpplint (only works in a git repo)
+  # comment the line when this package is in a git repo and when
+  # a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_cpplint_FOUND TRUE)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>turtle_nest</name>
+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>ROS 2 Package Creator</description>

+

+
+  <export>

@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@
+QT       += core gui printsupport
+
+greaterThan(QT_MAJOR_VERSION, 4): QT += widgets
+
+CONFIG += c++17
+
+# You can make your code fail to compile if it uses deprecated APIs.
+# In order to do so, uncomment the following line.
+#DEFINES += QT_DISABLE_DEPRECATED_BEFORE=0x060000    # disables all the APIs deprecated before Qt 6.0.0
+
+SOURCES += \
+    src/file_utils.cpp \
+    src/generate_launch.cpp \
+    src/generate_node.cpp \
+    src/main.cpp \
+    src/mainwindow.cpp \
+    src/rospkgcreator.cpp \
+    src/string_tools.cpp
+
+HEADERS += \
+    include/turtle_nest/build_type_enum.h \
+    include/turtle_nest/file_utils.h \
+    include/turtle_nest/generate_launch.h \
+    include/turtle_nest/generate_node.h \
+    include/turtle_nest/mainwindow.h \
+    include/turtle_nest/rospkgcreator.h \
+    include/turtle_nest/string_tools.h
+
+FORMS += \
+    src/mainwindow.ui
+
+INCLUDEPATH += /usr/include
+INCLUDEPATH += $$PWD/include
+
+# Default rules for deployment.
+qnx: target.path = /tmp/$${TARGET}/bin
+else: unix:!android: target.path = /opt/$${TARGET}/bin
+!isEmpty(target.path): INSTALLS += target
+
+DISTFILES += \
+    custom_theme.qss
+
+RESOURCES += \
+    resources.qrc

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@

+ * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+ * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+ * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+ * limitations under the License.
+ * ------------------------------------------------------------------
+*/
+
+#include <gtest/gtest.h>
+
+int main(int argc, char *argv[])
+{
+    ::testing::InitGoogleTest(&argc, argv);
+    return RUN_ALL_TESTS();
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+include(gtest_dependency.pri)
+
+QT       += core gui printsupport
+greaterThan(QT_MAJOR_VERSION, 4): QT += widgets
+
+TEMPLATE = app
+CONFIG += console c++17
+CONFIG += thread
+
+SOURCES += \
+        main.cpp \
+        tst_file_utils.cpp \
+        tst_generate_node.cpp \
+        tst_ros_pkg_creator.cpp \
+        ../turtle_nest/src/file_utils.cpp \
+        ../turtle_nest/src/generate_node.cpp \
+        ../turtle_nest/src/rospkgcreator.cpp \
+        ../turtle_nest/src/generate_launch.cpp \
+        ../turtle_nest/src/string_tools.cpp
+
+INCLUDEPATH += ../turtle_nest/include/

data.author: ahcorde
data.message:
Replace ament_target_dependencies with target_link_libraries (#16)

Signed-off-by: Alejandro Hernandez Cordero <ahcorde@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,9 +71,6 @@ endforeach()
 
 
 target_compile_features(turtle_nest PUBLIC c_std_99 cxx_std_17)  # Require C99 and C++17
-ament_target_dependencies(
-  turtle_nest
-)
 
 install(TARGETS turtle_nest
   DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})
